Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.vacuum.VacuumCollapseAnalyzer

Packages that use VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.vacuum
 

  • Uses of VacuumCollapseAnalyzer in neqsim.process.safety.vacuum

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.vacuum that return VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.setAtmosphericPressure(double pressure, String pressureUnit)
    Sets the atmospheric reference pressure used to quantify the vacuum depth.
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.setColdEndTemperature(double temperature, String temperatureUnit)
    Sets the cold-end temperature the blocked-in vessel cools down to.
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.setCoolingSteps(int steps)
    Sets the number of temperature steps in the cooling sweep.
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.setExternalPressureRating(double pressure, String pressureUnit)
    Sets the vessel external-pressure (vacuum) rating: the lowest absolute internal pressure the shell tolerates.
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.setInitialConditions(double pressure, String pressureUnit, double temperature, String temperatureUnit)
    Sets the initial blocked-in pressure and temperature.
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.setMakeupGasMolarMass(double molarMassKgPerMol)
    Sets the molar mass of the make-up gas used for the screening pad-gas estimate (default nitrogen).
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer
    VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.setMakeupSetpoint(double pressure, String pressureUnit)
    Sets the make-up / pad-gas set point: the internal pressure that vacuum protection should restore.
